title: verbascum × ambiguum
intro: Verbascum × ambiguum, also known as the hybrid mullein, is a plant species that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is a result of the cross between Verbascum blattaria and Verbascum lychnitis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × ambiguum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Verbascum × ambiguum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health conditions.
